Layout.footerTagline: A precision catalog for manufacturer lure knowledge and field compatibility.
Layout.footerDevelopedBy: TrollMatch is developed by Balık Oltamda.

meta.title: TrollMatch — Global lure intelligence
meta.description: Explore manufacturer-verified lure catalogs, target species, and fishing techniques in one premium knowledge platform.

hero.title: Know every lure.
hero.description: TrollMatch unifies factory specifications, import pipelines, and field compatibility into a single source of truth for serious anglers.
hero.searchPlaceholder: Search by model, manufacturer, or species…

species.title: Featured species
species.description: Target species with the strongest lure compatibility data in the catalog.

collections.title: Featured collections
collections.description: Curated lure families grouped by technique and water column.

manufacturers.title: Featured manufacturers
manufacturers.description: Global hard-bait brands connected through the production import registry.

latest.title: Latest imported lures
latest.description: Recently synced models from active manufacturer pipelines.

statistics.title: Platform statistics
statistics.description: Live indicators from the TrollMatch catalog and import infrastructure.

sections.speciesDescription: Curated, marketing, and community-supported target species.
sections.techniquesDescription: Fishing methods suited to this lure design.
sections.communityDescription: Aggregated field evidence from approved contributions.
sections.sponsoredDescription: Optional sponsored outbound links — user-initiated only.
sections.historyDescription: Public timeline of meaningful catalog updates.

community.source: Derived from community evidence — not manufacturer claims.

sponsored.disclaimer: Sponsored links do not affect discovery ranking. Purchase options appear only when you choose to view retailers.
